description: Chinese American street gang prominent in New York City's Chinatown from the 1970s to the early 1990s. Formed in 1967 by immigrants primarily from Hong Kong, they were affiliated with the Hip Sing Tong. Engaged in extortion, kidnapping, murder, racketeering, illegal gambling, and heroin trafficking. The gang was largely dismantled after a 1994 federal indictment of 33 members.

country_links.evidence_quote: They have also been allegedly linked to criminal activities in parts of Canada and Australia.
country_links.context: The Flying Dragons have been allegedly linked to criminal activities in Australia.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Flying Dragons allegedly maintained significant operations across Chinatowns in the United States and in Hong Kong.
